title: DEAYOU 8 Pack Natural Wood Slices, Unfinished Oval Wood Crafts with Bark, 9-11" L x 3-4" W Tree Slice Wooden Signs with Small Eye Rings and Rope for Centerpieces, DIY, Wedding
features: Our unfinished wood slices are made of pemium unpainted natural pine wood with barks, eco-friendly and not easy to crack. Each wood slab has been pre-sanded and polished to make the surface smooth and safe. Some wood bark may fall partially from the tree slice

Package includes 8 packs of wooden slices with small eye rings. Also coming with 8 pcs of 9.8"-11.8" long jute twines. Each blank wooden sign measures approx. 9-11" L x 3-4" W x 0.4" thickness. Different from other wood circles, our elegant oval shaped tree slices are ideal to make various wood crafts

DEAYOU natural wood slices are perfect for painting, engraving wood coasters, lettering, writing message, making house number, dining table number, street signs, billboards, gift tags, pendants, backdrop decorations, photo props

Our small wood plaques planks are pre-installed with eye rings, preserving the original form of the wood pieces. Just attached with jute ropes for easy hanging. You can start creating on the surface and making ornaments

These unfinished oval shaped wood signs are ideal for art classes, home, wall, wedding, party, holiday, Christmas, Halloween, Easter and any special event or occasion decorations. Also the ingenious gifts for your families and friends
